description_long: This is an electric guitar with a striking blue body adorned with bold, colorful graphics and text, giving it a custom, urban-inspired appearance. The body features a double-cutaway design, allowing easy access to the higher frets, and is equipped with a black tremolo bridge and multiple control knobs. The neck is dark, likely made of wood or a composite, with a series of metallic frets and white inlays for position marking. The headstock is angled and features six tuning pegs arranged in a single row, all black, matching the hardware. The guitar's surface is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing its vibrant artwork. The overall build suggests a solid-body construction typical of electric guitars, designed for both visual impact and musical performance.
description: A blue, custom-painted electric guitar with a double-cutaway body, black hardware, and a glossy finish. It features bold graphics, a tremolo bridge, and six inline tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full body artwork, fretboard, and headstock with all six tuning pegs visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body, neck, and the flatness of the instrument.
description_view_2: View from the base looking up the neck, emphasizing the string alignment, bridge, and control knobs.
description_view_3: Rear-side view displaying the back of the body and neck, with the headstock and tuning pegs in profile.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline black tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a sleek, modern contour.
